titles.title: Come And Grow in Christ With Me

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There you are, the one I longed And prayed for all my life There you are, My dream come true and friend, a Godly wife I could go on and serve Him on my own, Worship Him alone, But here's my desire…

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Come and grow in Christ with me Together He will shine through us For all the world to see Hand in hand through eternity Come and grow in Christ with me.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Here I am with a love for you and God that ever flows Here I am submitting to the plan that He has chose It's my desire to see his works done But two are better than one We'll serve him together
